extraction: TradingView internal chart model via Chromium CDP: daily main-series bars plus chart resolution switched to 60 for lower-timeframe main-series bars. The Pine script plots request.security_lower_tf() aggregate/count/first/last/high/low values; extracted 60m rows are grouped into the same daily chart bars for machine-readable fixture rows.
quality_notes: No synthetic intrabars were generated. bars.csv and lower_tf_bars.csv are both derived from TradingView's chart model over CDP; expected_lower_tf.json is a deterministic grouping/aggregation of those TradingView-derived rows. The first partially loaded 60m day was excluded so every committed chart bar has full seven-row regular-session 60m coverage.
